title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still cannot access it.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Customer attempted to pay using Visa ending 1234 but the payment keeps failing despite sufficient balance.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download their January invoice from the billing section. The download button is unresponsive.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Customer updated billing address but system still displays old information during checkout.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Mobile app crashes immediately after opening on Android 13 devices.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested refund two weeks ago but has not received the amount yet.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: Customer is not receiving 2FA verification code on registered phone number.

title: Unable to Update Profile Picture
description: Customer receives 'Upload Failed' error while trying to change profile image.

title: Subscription Auto-Renewal Error
description: Auto-renewal failed even though payment method is active and valid.

title: Missing Order Confirmation Email
description: Customer placed order but did not receive confirmation email.

title: Account Suspended Unexpectedly
description: Customer account was suspended without prior notification or explanation.

title: Coupon Code Not Working
description: Promotional coupon code shows as invalid even though it's still within expiry date.

title: Delayed Order Delivery
description: Customer reports that their order has not been delivered even after expected delivery date.

title: Error 500 on Dashboard
description: User encounters 500 internal server error while accessing analytics dashboard.

title: Unable to Change Password
description: Customer receives validation error while trying to set new password.
